title: Amplified TNT
description: This datapack adds a new tnt that can increase the explosion level
body:
![..](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d25cf11b9510b0fc2c0d7a1dbcdc9c64fc18639f_0.webp)


Instructions:

## **How to turn it on?**

To turn on the Amplified TNT, you need to place a redstone block next to the TNT. Keep in mind that if you try to light it by clicking with a lighter or placing it near the fire, it will not activate

## **How can I increase the explosion level?**

Just throw gunpowder on the block. Each time you do this, the number at the top will increase (with a limit of 12 units of powder per block). Also, keep in mind that the explosion radius will also increase with each powder.

![adasd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9466ada5ec16bb9e85706e548b14e0bb0a7ce019_0.webp)

ANY BUG SEND EVIDENCE TO THE DISCORD
